name: axon-lang
summary: AXON v1.4.2 — Mobile Typed Channels. First-class typed channels with π-calculus mobility (Channel<T> as affine resource, channel-as-value, capability extrusion via shield-mediated publish, discover for typed dynamic import), second-order session types (Honda-Yoshida 1999), runtime TypedEventBus with QoS dispatch, migration path from legacy string topics (removed v2.0). See paper_mobile_channels.md. Builds on v1.4.1 axon-frontend extraction.
author: Bemarking AI S.A.S.
